Name: Thrash
Description: A wild thrashing attack that damages the user slightly.

Name: Smash
Description: A solid strike with fists or body.

Name: Crash
Description: A devastating charging attack. User loses some HP from impact.

Name: Bash
Description: A forceful bash that may lower opponent's Defense.

Name: Mash
Description: Rapid strikes that wear down the opponent.

Name: Lash
Description: A whipping lash attack with moderate power.

Name: Jab
Description: A quick punch at the opponent. Has a high chance to hit first.

Name: Cross Counter
Description: A powerful counter-punch. Damage increases if the opponent attacked last turn.

Name: Seismic Slam
Description: A heavy strike that shakes the ground. May lower opponent's Defense.

Name: Sunder
Description: Inflicts minor damage and a defense debuff on the opponent.

Name: Cascade
Description: Increases priority with each use. Medium damage.

Name: Guillotine
Description: A devastating finishing blow. More powerful if the opponent's HP is already low.

Name: Cataclysm
Description: An earth-shattering strike. Lower user's Defense after use.

Name: Crackle
Description: A crackling burst of electricity.

Name: Spark
Description: A burst of electricity strikes the opponent.

Name: Flicker
Description: Quick electrical bursts that light up the area.

Name: Blitz
Description: A fast electrical strike that may paralyze.

Name: Volt Tap
Description: The user strikes with electric energy. May paralyze.

Name: Discharge
Description: A powerful burst of electricity. May paralyze nearby opponents.

Name: Thunderstrike
Description: The user channels lightning into a strike. May paralyze the opponent.

Name: Thunderbolt
Description: A powerful electrical surge. May paralyze the opponent.

Name: Buffoon
Description: A silly dance that confuses the opponent and raises user's Defense.

Name: Typhoon
Description: A massive typhoon engulfs the battlefield.

Name: Gale
Description: A strong gale wind pushes the opponent back.

Name: Gust
Description: A gust of wind strikes the opponent from above.

Name: Slash
Description: A sharp cut with claws or blades. High critical hit ratio.

Name: Cyclone
Description: A spinning vortex of wind. Lowers opponent's accuracy by 1 stage.

Name: Razor Wind
Description: Sharp winds slice the opponent. High critical hit ratio.

Name: Gale Force
Description: A hurricane-force wind. User loses some HP due to strain.

Name: Riptide
Description: Hits twice. Second hit has 50% power but ignores defense.

Name: Smolder
Description: A smoldering flame that slowly burns the opponent.

Name: Ember
Description: A small flame bursts from the user toward the opponent.

Name: Cinder
Description: The user scratches with burning claws. May inflict burn.

Name: Inferno Smash
Description: A flaming punch that crashes down with intense heat.

Name: Pyre
Description: Intense flames rise up in a massive pyre.

Name: Blaze
Description: An overwhelming blaze engulfs the opponent.

Name: Inferno Strike
Description: A flaming strike with intense heat. May inflict burn (30% chance).

Name: Magma Burst
Description: A burst of magma erupts at the opponent. User takes 25% recoil damage.

Name: Inferno Surge
Description: An intense wave of flames. May burn the opponent.

Name: Meteor Strike
Description: A flaming meteor crashes down. Has recoil damage equal to 25% of damage dealt.

Name: Freeze
Description: An icy attack that may freeze the opponent solid.

Name: Chill
Description: An icy breath hits the opponent. May lower Speed.

Name: Frost
Description: The user coats their claws in ice and strikes. May freeze.

Name: Permafrost
Description: The user strikes with subzero cold. Lowers opponent's Speed by 2 stages.

Name: Blizzard Shards
Description: Jagged ice shards rain down. May freeze the opponent (25% chance).

Name: Absolute Zero
Description: An overwhelming blast of subzero energy. High chance to freeze.

Name: Dim Shot
Description: A blast of negative energy

Name: Spook
Description: A haunting attack

Name: Shadow Claw
Description: A ghostly claw strikes from the shadows. High critical hit ratio.

Name: Phantom
Description: A burst of spectral energy engulfs the opponent.

Name: Haunt
Description: A ghostly strike that lingers. Reduces opponent's Special Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Spectral Surge
Description: A wave of ghostly energy. Ignores one layer of the opponent's stat boosts.

Name: Phantom Assault
Description: A relentless barrage of ghostly strikes. Hits 2-3 times.

Name: Hex
Description: A curse strikes the opponent harder if they're already afflicted.

Name: Siphon
Description: Reduces enemy Attack and increases user's Special Attack.

Name: Weaken
Description: Lowers the opponent's Attack by 1 stage.

Name: Scold
Description: Minor defense debuff. Lowers opponent's Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Fatigue
Description: Drains the opponent's energy. Lowers Speed by 1 stage.

Name: Vulnerability
Description: Exposes the opponent's weak points. Lowers Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Drain
Description: Saps the opponent's vitality. Lowers Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage each turn for 3 turns.

Name: Rend
Description: A brutal tearing attack. Lowers opponent's Defense significantly.

Name: Bold
Description: Improves Attack and Fighting-type move damage by 1 stage.

Name: Harden
Description: Hardens the user's body. Raises Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Focus
Description: The user focuses their power. Raises Special Attack by 1 stage.

Name: Steel Skin
Description: The user's body becomes hardened. Raises both Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Overdrive
Description: The user's power surges. Raises Attack and Speed by 1 stage.

Name: Mend
Description: The user recovers 15% of their max HP.

Name: Soothe
Description: The user recovers 20% of their max HP.

Name: Sip
Description: The user takes a restorative breath. Recovers 25% of max HP.

Name: Brace
Description: The user braces themselves. Recovers 20% of max HP and raises Defense by 1 stage.

Name: Circle Heal
Description: All allies recover 25% of their max HP.
